note: Edge Strength (confidence) reflects how strongly the factor model favors one side over the other. It is a bounded, linear score derived from weighted factor differentials -- it has NOT been calibrated against outcomes and must not be interpreted as a win probability. The rates below describe what happened in the graded sample, not a validated forecast.

sampleSizeWarnings.overall: Sample size (0 graded picks) is below the 20-record warning threshold -- overall rates are not statistically meaningful yet.
